title: VR Training Platform
description: Transfr Trek is a live VR platform used by thousands of students in the US. I maintained a Unity product SDK at the senior level, working in cross-functional teams and architecting key infrastructure. I also followed up on and implemented feedback from SDK users, who were primarily XR designers working on simulations.

title: Asset Bundle Management System
description: I architected, implemented, and maintained a custom asset bundle management system based on Unity Addressables to optimize load times and memory usage for our VR training platform. This system enabled dynamic content updates and improved performance across multiple VR devices for hundreds of customers. One of my key achievements was reducing download bandwidth by up to 90%.

title: Synthetic Training Data for Computer Vision
description: I enabled the machine learning researchers on my team to apply novel CV and sensor fusion techniques in a real-time virtual 3D environment. I wrote compute shaders for some of these projects which involved sim-to-real ML obstacle avoidance training of a real world robot.

title: AR Assistant for Retail (Hololens)
description: I implemented and enabled innovation of novel UI/UX design by working closely on a design-led team. Optimization in Unity for the Hololens in a resource-heavy application was key. I will never hear "bread, milk, eggs" the same way again.

title: Animated Twitch Overlay
description: I made a swimming shark overlay in Unity for SomnaMusic, who is a Twitch Partner streamer.

title: AR Business Card
description: Mobile AR business cards for myself and coworkers using Unity (Android/iOS) and the 8th Wall SDK. I also captured everyone's head using Intel RealSense photogrammetry.

title: Thunder
description: A Blackfoot language learning VR game for Oculus Go using Unity and the Oculus SDK. It was invited to the Vancouver and Nashville International Film Festivals in 2019. I also did sound design in Ableton.

title: PASS VR Training
description: An Oculus Go port of MAMMOTH's fire extinguisher training in Unreal Engine 4. I did extensive optimization of the extinguishing mechanic and environments for mobile VR.
